answers.where: I returned to Frost Keep after being away; the camp recovered resources while the hero was idle.
answers.action: Collect the offline return, then use the recovered Frost Blocks to repair the Keep again.
answers.response: The popup shows time away, Gold, Frost Blocks, and the Camp Supplies multiplier in one readable reward moment.
answers.reward: Offline time now advances the repair loop because it grants Frost Blocks, not only Gold.
answers.game_look: The screen keeps the snowy idle RPG scene visible while a focused reward popup sits on solid panels with clear resource icons and a single Collect action.

next: Improve reset/offline reward animation and audio, then run a broader first-5-minute retention critic.
